# SaaS Starter

SaaS Starter is a Laravel product-site template extracted from the current main-site implementation.

## Included capabilities

- Google web login and Google ID token API login
- OAuth access tokens, refresh tokens, device sessions, and session revocation
- Stripe Checkout, webhooks, subscriptions, orders, and customer portal
- Product catalog, product pages, pricing pages, blog posts, product articles, and SEO routes
- Filament admin resources for users, sessions, products, plans, subscriptions, orders, blog posts, product articles, API keys, and analytics

Product-specific business logic should be added by the product site after copying this template.
